name: plaintext-requested-full-factorial
description: Full plaintext factorial design using the requested Kafka deployment and producer workload parameters.
implementation_notes: broker_count changes require provisioning or selecting active brokers; the current live cluster has 3 brokers.
producer_count requires true concurrent producer execution before values above 1 are valid dissertation evidence.
compression_type and min_insync_replicas are wired into the current plaintext benchmark path.
